rulings.Case Title: TATIANA KUZNETSOVA VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 27, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurer. Plaintiff filed a non-opposition seeking leave to amend instead of filing an amended complaint 9 court days before the noticed hearing. Plaintiff shall file and serve amended complaint no later than March 27, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TATIANA KUZNETSOVA VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 27, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the motion in good faith. rulings.Case Title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. VS. EDUARDO MANZANAREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set Aside Default, Vacate Default Judgment, And Recall Writ Of Execution; Memo Of P&A; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 27, 2018, line 6. DEFENDANT EDUARDO MANZANAREZ Motion To Set Aside Default, Vacate Default Judgment, And Recall Writ Of Execution Hearing Required to address (1) actual notice based on posted copy of the Summons and Complaint; and (2) purported payment by cashier's checks dated February 6, 2018 and January 12, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 212-214 CALIFORNIA ST LLC VS. CBD SOLUTIONS INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 27, 2018, line 7. DEFENDANT CBD SOLUTIONS INC., CSDO INC, DBA WELLNESS SOLUTIONS, TARA MCKNIGHT, ROBERT BERTUCCI, CSBB, INC. DBA 2ONE2, CALIFORNIA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Demurer to the first cause of action is sustained with leave to amend as requested by Plaintiff. Demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts showing that corporate defendant was properly personally served under the terms of the Lease or was served in any other manner authorized by the Lease. Request for Judicial Notice of the Lease is granted. = (501/REQ)
